title: Organon Vs. Viatris: Who Is The Clear Winner?
text: Organon's P/E ratio was 6.5 at the end of Q1 2022, significantly lower than the pharmaceutical industry average. Viatris' revenue was $4,191.7 million in the first quarter of 2022, down 5.4% from a year earlier.
